name: AI Health Score Calculator
description: Aggregates multi-source signals (usage, support, engagement, sentiment) into a dynamic health score updated daily.
longDescription: Creates a composite health score from multiple data sources: product usage data from Mixpanel, support ticket frequency and severity from Zendesk, email engagement metrics, NPS/CSAT scores from Salesforce, and stakeholder activity signals. Runs daily to update each account's health score and posts a summary to Slack with accounts that changed status.
